atom: <?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?><feed xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2005/Atom"><entry><id>http://arxiv.org/abs/2607.00001v1</id><updated>2026-07-10T10:00:00Z</updated><published>2026-07-10T10:00:00Z</published><title>Contact-Aware Whole-Body Policies for Humanoid Manipulation</title><summary>We present a humanoid whole-body policy that combines manipulation and locomotion with contact-aware action tokens and simulation pretraining.</summary><author><name>Lin Robot</name></author><category term="cs.RO"/><link rel="alternate" href="http://arxiv.org/abs/2607.00001v1"/><link title="pdf" href="http://arxiv.org/pdf/2607.00001v1"/></entry><entry><id>http://arxiv.org/abs/2607.00002v1</id><updated>2026-07-11T10:00:00Z</updated><published>2026-07-11T10:00:00Z</published><title>Memory World Models for Long-Horizon Humanoid Control</title><summary>A recurrent world model predicts embodied state and supports long-horizon humanoid locomotion under partial observation.</summary><author><name>Mira Control</name></author><category term="cs.RO"/><category term="cs.LG"/><link rel="alternate" href="http://arxiv.org/abs/2607.00002v1"/><link title="pdf" href="http://arxiv.org/pdf/2607.00002v1"/></entry><entry><id>http://arxiv.org/abs/2607.00003v1</id><updated>2026-07-12T10:00:00Z</updated><published>2026-07-12T10:00:00Z</published><title>Vision-Language-Action Transfer with Teleoperated Robot Data</title><summary>We train a vision-language-action foundation model on teleoperation demonstrations and study cross-robot transfer for embodied manipulation.</summary><author><name>Ada Motion</name></author><category term="cs.RO"/><category term="cs.AI"/><link rel="alternate" href="http://arxiv.org/abs/2607.00003v1"/><link title="pdf" href="http://arxiv.org/pdf/2607.00003v1"/></entry></feed>
